stories.title: Student signup and profile setup
stories.changes: Enhancement: Complete detail pages for Academics, Tests, Achievements, and Activities sections. Replaced showSectionPlaceholder with showAcademicDetail, showTestsDetail, showAchievementsDetail, and showActivitiesDetail. Added GET /api/profile/section/:name backend endpoint. impact_statements and essays placeholders now redirect to their proper routes. Proper empty states and back navigation on all detail views.

notes: Minor release — new UI detail pages for all four profile sections. No breaking changes. No database migrations. No new dependencies.
